name: June Dragon Release 2026
@new.description: Now that we've all had our fill of 20th Birthday cake, let's get back to hunting. Catch these new breeds in the Alpine, Desert, and Volcano

name: Alcedine Wyvern
alcedine.description: The brilliant blue spots on this egg stand out

name: Algarre Dragon
algarre.description: This dull mottled egg blends into the surrounding algae

name: Almerald Dragon
almerald.description: This glossy green egg is rather warm

name: Antarean Dragon
antarean.description: This egg is surrounded by mysterious, reflective dust

name: Aranoa Dragon
aranoa.description: The vibrant scales on this egg glisten in the sunlight

name: Aspect of Form
aspect_form.description: This resplendent egg emanates a constantly shifting aura

name: Aspect of Mana
aspect_mana.description: This radiant egg emanates a magical aura

name: Aspect of Soul
aspect_soul.description: This warm egg emanates an otherworldly aura

name: Avarice Dragon
avarice.description: This egg is large and ornate

name: Avin Pygmy
avin.description: This tiny white egg shakes sometimes

name: Black Dragon
black.description: This egg has a faint green glow around it

name: Black Tea Dragon
black_tea.description: This egg has a faintly exotic scent

name: Blazeback Dragon
blazeback.description: This egg has a dull metallic luster and is hot to the touch

name: Carmine Wyvern
carmine.description: This pink and red egg wobbles occasionally

name: Celestial Dragon
celestial.description: This egg's slick shell is covered in lustrous, vibrant scales

name: Daydream Dragon
daydream.description: This egg is sitting on a cloud

name: Delta Dragon
delta.description: This speckled egg has deep blue spots

name: Delta Dragon (Small)
delta_small.description: This speckled egg has deep blue spots

name: Diamondwing Dragon
diamondwing.description: This egg shines like a diamond

name: Duotone Dragon
duotone.description: This egg can't seem to make up its mind what color it is

name: Electric Dragon
electric.description: Bright sparks glide across the surface of this egg's shell

name: Fire Gem Dragon Red
Fire Gem Dragon Green
Fire Gem Dragon Blue
fire_gem.description: This rough egg has shimmering veins of crystal running across its surface

name: Floret Wyvern (Alstroemeria - Purple)
Floret Wyvern (Alstroemeria - Gold)
Floret Wyvern (Alstroemeria - Pink)
floret_alstroemeria.description: This shiny egg smells faintly like flowers

name: Floret Wyvern (Iris - Purple)
Floret Wyvern (Iris - Gold)
Floret Wyvern (Iris - Pink)
floret_iris.description: This shiny egg smells faintly like flowers

name: Frostbite Dragon
frostbite.description: Frost is creeping over this cold egg

name: Galvanic Wyvern
galvanic.description: Powerful energy emanates from this egg

name: Gemshard Dragon
gemshard.description: This egg is encrusted with colorful gemstones

name: Green Dragon
green.description: This egg is sitting in a pile of small pebbles

name: Hellfire Wyvern
hellfire.description: This egg radiates the heat of a fell flame

name: Ignimbri Dragon
ignimbri.description: This egg sits atop a pile of smoldering ash

name: Kymatumi Dragon
kymatumi.description: This glimmering egg emanates the ocean's sounds

name: Miufu Dragon
miufu.description: This golden egg is shiny and warm

name: Nebula Dragon
nebula.description: This egg glows with a brilliant radiance

name: Nocturne Dragon
nocturne.description: This egg appears to be made of limestone

name: Papillune Pygmy Gold
Papillune Pygmy Blue
papillune.description: This tiny egg glints in the moonlight

name: Purple Dragon
purple.description: Wow, purple isn't a color of egg you expected to see

name: Ridgewing Dragon Purple
Ridgewing Dragon Tan
ridgewing.description: A cool mountain breeze blows around this egg

name: Sapo Dragon
sapo.description: This egg's shell is slippery and clean

name: Seasonal Dragon (Spring)
seasonal_spring.description: The markings on this egg match the weather outside

name: Seasonal Dragon (Summer)
seasonal_summer.description: The markings on this egg match the weather outside

name: Seraph Dragon
seraph.description: This egg is covered in soft, downy feathers

name: Skystrider Dragon
skystrider.description: This plain blue egg almost seems to float

name: Slag-Tail Behemoth
slag_tail.description: This heavy egg is enveloped in thick, sturdy plates

name: Spitfire Dragon
spitfire.description: This egg has brightly colored markings on it

name: Storm Dragon
storm.description: This egg is surrounded by fog

name: Stormherald Dragon
stormherald.description: This metal egg discharges bolts of electricity occasionally

name: Striped Dragon (White)
Striped Dragon (Blue)
Striped Dragon (Red)
Striped Dragon (Green)
Striped Dragon (Black)
striped.description: This egg has brightly colored markings on it

name: Striped River Dragon
striped_river.description: A small puddle of condensation has collected under this egg

name: Sunstone Dragon
sunstone.description: This egg resembles a glowing stone

name: Thousand Wish Dragon
thousand_wish.description: A serene calm washes over you as you approach this navy egg

name: Turpentine Dragon
turpentine.description: This egg smells strongly of turpentine

name: Warden of Realms
warden.description: This egg hums with a quiet power, as though something within is beginning to stir

name: Water Dragon
water.description: This egg is sitting in a shallow puddle

name: White Dragon
white.description: This egg has a very clean look; it's completely devoid of dirt and scratches

name: Wisteria Dragon
wisteria.description: This egg is surrounded by beautiful flowers
